amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 44 a (new)
parliament_text:
(44a) ‘personal data’ means personal data as defined in Article 4, point (1) of Regulation (EU)2016/679;

‘personal data’ means personal data as defined in Article 4, point (1) of Regulation (EU)2016/679;
